problem id: cb3317fe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  01111000 -> 11110000
  11011110 -> 10111101
  10100000 -> 01000001
  10011101 -> 10111011
  00000111 -> 10001110
  00110000 -> 01100000
  00110011 -> 11100110
  10011110 -> 00111101

query: 10010100
predicted answer: 00101001
